notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead grounds into a double play, second baseman Cole Young to first baseman Josh Naylor. James Wood out at 2nd. Curtis Mead out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Riley Cornelio. Cole Young scores. Julio Rodríguez to 3rd. Victor Robles to 2nd.
